Part I. Existing Designs References

Part II. Understanding Information Architecture

Information architecture (IA) is the practice of structuring and organizing information to make it easier for users to find what they need and understand the content within a digital product or system.

Examples of IA:

Source: https://www.toptal.com/designers/ia/guide-to-information-architecture
